title: melicope tietaensis
intro: Melicope tietaensis, a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, is a type of citrus tree native to New Caledonia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Melicope tietaensis include its potential to aid in the treatment of various ailments, such as skin conditions and respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves or bark in hot water, which can be used to make teas or applied topically to the affected area.
